---
title: "Guests of the R/Pharma Hangouts"
description: |
  A gallery of the previous guests on the R/Pharma Hangouts! Ordered by most recent appearance on the series.
listing:
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  fields: [title, subtitle, image]
  image-align: left
comments: false

format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
---
